LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD, GRANTED; NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE:PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LEE, ANDREW M $11,147.76 PRINCIPAL, $346.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,493.76, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT"
